title: Swiggy Restaurant Scraper Input
description: Collect public restaurant listing data from Swiggy by city, locality, and cuisine.

cities.title: Cities
cities.description: Cities to scrape, for example Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, or Ahmedabad.

localities.title: Localities / Areas
localities.description: Optional areas within the city. Leave empty to search the city page.

cuisines.title: Cuisine filters
cuisines.description: Optional cuisine filters such as Chinese, North Indian, Italian, Biryani, or South Indian.

sortBy.title: Sort order
sortBy.description: Preferred result sorting when Swiggy exposes sorting controls.

scrapeMenuSummary.title: Scrape menu summary
scrapeMenuSummary.description: Optionally visit restaurant pages to extract menu category counts when visible. This increases runtime.

maxResults.title: Maximum restaurants
maxResults.description: Maximum unique restaurant records to save across selected cities and filters.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: India residential proxies are recommended for reliable regional access.
